metric_notes.answer_correctness: For answerable items: mean of token F1 and expected-keyword coverage; for unanswerable items: correct refusal indicator.
metric_notes.faithfulness: Fraction of answer claims whose content-token coverage is >=0.55 in one retrieved passage, with exact numeric consistency required.
metric_notes.retrieval_relevance: First retrieved chunk for each ground-truth document/page target is relevant; duplicate chunks from the same target are not counted twice.
metric_notes.citation_precision: Citation document/page/chunk must match a retrieved passage and quoted evidence must match that passage.
metric_notes.hallucination: Query-level indicator: an unanswerable query was answered, or a non-refusal answer contained at least one unsupported claim.
metric_notes.missing_values: N/A/null means the adapter did not expose the required evidence, latency, token, cost, citation, or validation field; no value is imputed.
